data.description: On March 13, 2026, in Los Angeles, the Scientology Network will air a prime-time event commemorating the 115th birthday of L. Ron Hubbard, the Founder of Scientology. The program will showcase his life, groundbreaking discoveries, and worldwide influence. Scheduled for 8:00 p.m. ET/PT, the broadcast will...

data.title: Korro Bio Stock Gains After Tough 2025 - New Drug Candidate, Analyst Upgrades Boost Outlook
data.description: Shares of Korro Bio Inc. (NASDAQ: KRRO) rose following the release of its fourth-quarter and full-year financial results. The company reported a net loss of $117.3 million for the year ending December 31, 2025, compared to a loss of $83.6 million in the previous year, mainly due to non-cash impairment charges. Korro Bio disclosed a cash balance of $85.2 million as of December 31, 2025, which is anticipated to support operations until the second half of 2028. Collaboration revenue surged to $6.4 million in 2025, up from $2.3 million in 2024, attributed to the partnership with Novo Nordisk A/S (NYSE: NVO). Despite the ups and downs throughout the year, Chardan Research described 2025 as a challenging period for Korro. The company experienced fluctuations in performance, notably seeing growth from June to October followed by a setback in November.

data.title: Ocient and TekSynap Announce Strategic Partnership to Advance Hyperscale Data Analytics for U.S. Government Missions
data.description: In Reston, Virginia, Ocient, an AI-driven solutions provider, and TekSynap Corporation, a federal technology company, have formed a strategic partnership to aid U.S. government agencies in updating their methods for handling large amounts of mission data. This collaboration merges Ocient’s hyperscale analytics platform with TekSynap’s expertise in secure cloud services, artificial intelligence, and cybersecurity. The aim is to assist agencies in enhancing their capabilities for ingesting, processing, and analyzing vast volumes of data efficiently.

data.title: A.P. Keaton Scales National Perfect Store Execution for Global Spirits Brands on PINATA’s AI-Powered Platform
data.description: A full-service marketing and experiential agency based in New York, A.P. Keaton, known for supporting renowned spirits portfolios like Campari Group, Diageo, Pernod Ricard, Bacardi, and Edrington, is increasing its utilization of Pinata. Pinata is an AI-powered operating system designed for brand execution. The agency is extending its use of this system to oversee and confirm retail merchandising initiatives on a nationwide level. This move comes as beverage alcohol brands are under mounting pressure to demonstrate return on investment in trade activities. The enhanced capacity to monitor in-store adherence and execute...

data.title: Suntex Enterprises Plans Share Dividend for Golden Triangle Ventures Shareholders as Acquisition Discussions Advance
data.description: In Austin, Texas on March 13, 2026, Suntex Enterprises, Inc. (OTCID: SNTX) revealed plans to initiate a proposed dividend distribution scheme offering shares of Suntex Enterprises to shareholders of Golden Triangle Ventures, Inc. (OTCID: GTVH). This initiative is contingent upon regulatory assessment and authorization.

data.title: The Inner Circle acknowledges Kenneth E. Richter Jr as an Inner Circle Lifetime member
data.description: In Fairfax, Virginia on March 13, 2026, Kenneth E. Richter Jr. was acknowledged in The Inner Circle as an esteemed Inner Circle Lifetime member due to his significant impact on military and private sector senior executive leadership. Kenneth E. Richter Jr., DO, has established a strong presence in these sectors with his valuable contributions.

data.title: Current oil supply shock impacts worldwide, unlike 1973 embargo. Governments hold reserves, cars are more fuel-efficient, but end date uncertain.
data.description: Oil reserves held by governments have been increased significantly in anticipation of supply disruptions in various countries. Additionally, advancements in technology have made vehicles more fuel-efficient. However, the current supply shock is being experienced on a global scale, causing uncertainty about its duration. No clear timeline has been established for when the situation may stabilize.

data.title: BlackArch Partners Featured on Middle Market Musings Podcast
data.description: In a recent podcast episode of Middle Market Musings, BlackArch's significance within the M&A advisory sector was showcased. The spotlight was on Rit Amin, Regions Securities' Executive Managing Director and Capital Markets Head, discussing their role. The podcast aired on March 13, 2026, in Charlotte, N.C. This recognition reflects the firm's growing influence in the industry.

data.title: Higgsfield Launches Similarity-Scoring Tool for Responsible AI Use in Media and Entertainment
data.description: Higgsfield is advancing in the maturing generative AI industry by introducing a new tool for creators and studios to assess similarity with characters, celebrity likeness, and brands. The development was announced in San Francisco on March 13, 2026. This tool aims to enhance the creative process and boost productivity within the industry.

data.title: CUPE’s largest Nova Scotian Nursing Home Local Votes to Strike
data.description: In Sydney, NS, employees at Harbourstone Enhanced Care, part of CUPE Local 1183, have voted overwhelmingly with an 87% majority in favor of a strike mandate. This decision marks them as the 39th CUPE long term care facility to take this stance. The workers emphasize their dedication to their roles in the long-term care sector, citing their genuine concern for the residents and their families as the driving force behind their actions. This demonstration of solidarity underscores their commitment to contributing positively to the lives of those under their care.

data.title: GRK Fasteners Introduces ICC‑Approved Metal Connector Screw
data.description: In Glenview, Illinois, on March 13, 2026, GRK Fasteners introduced their innovative Star Drive™ technology for metal-to-wood fastening. The technology promises faster and more efficient results while ensuring compliance with building codes. GRK Fasteners is a prominent provider of high-quality fastening solutions for professional contractors. The company has unveiled its latest product, the GRK Metal Connector, which is set to revolutionize metal-to-wood fastening processes.

data.title: 'The Jay Walker Podcast' Crosses Historic 1 million Download Milestone
data.description: On March 13, 2026, in Nashville, Tennessee, Jay Walker, Host and Executive Producer of The Jay Walker Podcast, achieved a significant milestone by surpassing 1 million downloads. This accomplishment solidifies his reputation as a leading figure in contemporary media. The data from Podtrac confirms the historic nature of this achievement, highlighting the immense popularity of The Jay Walker Podcast.
